submitted_sql: WITH base AS (SELECT user_id, av_id, model_group, score, CASE WHEN active_level BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'low' WHEN active_level BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 'mid' ELSE 'high' END AS active_group FROM model_scores WHERE score BETWEEN 0 AND 1), ranked AS (SELECT active_group, model_group, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY active_group, model_group ORDER BY score) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY active_group, model_group) AS cnt_all FROM base), agg AS (SELECT active_group, model_group, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(score) AS avg_score, STDDEV_SAMP(score) AS std_score FROM base GROUP BY active_group, model_group), quantiles AS (SELECT active_group, model_group, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CEIL(cnt_all * 0.10) THEN score END) AS p10_score, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CEIL(cnt_all * 0.50) THEN score END) AS p50_score, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CEIL(cnt_all * 0.90) THEN score END) AS p90_score, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = CEIL(cnt_all * 0.99) THEN score END) AS p99_score FROM ranked GROUP BY active_group, model_group) SELECT a.active_group, a.model_group, a.cnt, ROUND(a.avg_score, 6) AS avg_score, ROUND(a.std_score, 6) AS std_score, ROUND(q.p10_score, 6) AS p10_score, ROUND(q.p50_score, 6) AS p50_score, ROUND(q.p90_score, 6) AS p90_score, ROUND(q.p99_score, 6) AS p99_score FROM agg a JOIN quantiles q ON a.active_group = q.active_group AND a.model_group = q.model_group ORDER BY a.active_group ASC, a.model_group ASC;
